comments.body:
I agree this is a real UX gap. The current flow reports child completion, then can silently stop on the parent when the planner decides there is no next child/action.

Relevant code paths:

- [`agent-orchestrator.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml#L82-L196) runs the planner, then calls `orchestrate-handoff`.
- [`reportTerminalToParent`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts#L681-L756) posts the child completion comment and re-dispatches the parent orchestrator.
- When the parent later stops, the non-dispatch path only comments for initial `/orchestrate` stops, unsatisfactory `implement`/`fix-pr` stops, and child terminal reports: [`orchestrate-handoff.ts#L924-L929`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts#L924-L929). It does not post a final parent-level terminal comment for `source_action=orchestrate`.
- Planner stop/block decisions are normalized in [`handoff.ts#L349-L360`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/handoff.ts#L349-L360).

Proposed fix:

1. Add a parent-terminal stop comment path in `orchestrate-handoff.ts` for meta-orchestrator runs, e.g. `source_action=orchestrate`, `target_kind=issue`, `automation_mode=agent`, and a non-dispatch decision after the initial start.
2. Reuse `createOrchestrateStopComment`, but improve the `orchestrate` stop format so it includes source conclusion, target, round, and reason instead of only `Sepo orchestration stopped: ...`.
3. Add a small dedupe guard using the existing `<!-- sepo-agent-orchestrate-stop -->` marker, so reruns do not spam identical final comments.
4. Add tests in [`orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.ts), covering:
   - parent meta-orchestrator stop after child result posts a final comment on the parent issue;
   - no follow-up workflow is dispatched;
   - existing initial-stop and child-terminal-report behavior remains unchanged.
5. Update orchestrator docs, likely [`agent-orchestrator.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md), to state that terminal parent orchestration stops are visible on the parent issue.

Please approve this plan before coding; I would implement it via `/implement`.

Sepo adopted this issue as a sub-orchestrator child of #104.

Stage: parent-terminal-stop-comment
Parent round: 3

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:104 stage:parent-terminal-stop-comment state:done parent_round:3 -->
<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator-adoption -->

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `delegate_issue` (round 3/10).

agent planner selected child issue delegation: Continue the issue #104 sequential child plan. Child #90 finished with SHIP and open PR #108; #95 is the next concrete UX fix and should stack on #108 because it touches the same orchestrator comment surface.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777774570701 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNjc0MjkwMjM6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTA0OmRlbGVnYXRlX2lzc3VlOjk1OjM -->

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777774583671 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNjc0MjkwMjM6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6OTU6aW1wbGVtZW50Ojk1OjI -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-95/codex-25267543686`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/112

Added a parent meta-orchestrator terminal stop comment path with structured stop details and trusted exact-match dedupe, updated focused handoff tests and orchestrator docs, and verified with `npm run build`, the focused compiled handoff test, and `git diff --check`.

title: Orchestrator no terminal prompt
